action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline ResNet50 achieved test accuracy 70.54% with 5 epochs on noisy labels. Analysis: Label noise (~40%) limits performance; standard cross-entropy overfits to noise. Decision: Implement cleanlab-based cleaning pipeline: OOF cross-validated probabilities to detect noisy samples, then train final model only on clean subset with label smoothing.
